## 🚀 Publishing Timeline

### Today (Right Now)
1. Review `d:\LLM_AI_Github_Final\` folder
2. Copy your code files to appropriate folders
3. Verify no secrets are in code

### This Week
1. Create GitHub repository at github.com/new
2. Initialize git locally
3. Push to GitHub

### Ongoing
1. Monitor GitHub issues
2. Accept pull requests
3. Create releases

---

## 📝 Key Reminders

### Before Pushing
- [ ] Replace "yourusername" in docs with actual username
- [ ] Copy source code to all/, api/, Web/ folders
- [ ] Verify .env file is NOT in repo (only .env.example)
- [ ] Check .gitignore is working
- [ ] README is accurate for your setup

### GitHub Commands
```bash
cd d:\LLM_AI_Github_Final

git init
git add .
git commit -m "Initial commit: LLM_AI - Local RAG-Enabled AI System"
git branch -M main
git remote add origin https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/LLM_AI.git
git push -u origin main
```

### After Publishing
```bash
# Create a release
git tag -a v1.0.0 -m "First release"
git push origin v1.0.0

# Update docs as needed
git add docs/
git commit -m "docs: update documentation"
git push
```
